consumer-reviews.description: MCP server for consumer reviews and support tickets API - provides tools for managing reviews and support threads

tools.name: get_reviews_by_date_range
tools.description: Get consumer reviews filtered by date range and optional status

tools.name: update_review_status
tools.description: Update the status of a specific review

tools.name: pending_review
tools.description: Set a specific review to pending review status

tools.name: create_support_thread
tools.description: Create a new support thread with an initial message

tools.name: create_support_message
tools.description: Add a new message to an existing support thread

tools.name: close_support_thread
tools.description: Close a support thread (change status to closed)

tools.name: get_support_threads
tools.description: Get a paginated list of support threads with optional status filter

tools.name: get_support_thread_by_id
tools.description: Get a full support thread with all its messages

http-endpoint.description: HTTP Streamable MCP endpoint - accessible via HTTP POST/GET requests
